title: Success Page - Community Focus Style
prompt:
Title: Success Page - Community Focus Style
Context: Registration success page with Zalo QR for GOOGLE AI ECOSYSTEM BOOTCAMP 2026.
Description of the screen: A futuristic 'Success & Community' page for the AI Bootcamp. 
- VISUALS: Features a central glowing card with 'Đăng ký thành công!' in a bold modern font. A prominent green success badge is at the top.
- QR SECTION: The QR code is housed in a sleek frame with 'Scan to Join' instructions. The box has a soft neon border using Google's signature colors.
- CONTENT: Clearly states that the user is now part of the 2026 cohort. 
- BUTTONS: 'Vào Nhóm Zalo Ngay' (Primary Blue) and 'Quay lại Trang chủ' (Minimalist link).
- STYLE: Dark mode with a focus on 'Conversion' to the Zalo group. High-quality UI components and crisp typography. Variant 2 of 2.
Platform: web
Form factor: desktop
